meta.name: From Lassen, With Love
meta.description: In Northern California’s Lassen National Forest, wildlife biologist Alyssa enters ground zero of the 2021 Dixie Fire—one of the largest and most severe wildfires in state history. She returns to a place she calls home, in search of a species she knew. Pacific marten; an elusive and feisty forest carnivore deeply tied to environmental change.
